selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next math-class reduction target on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the engine contract math-class packet into controller-facing cycle, engine, stability, scalar, and semantic anti-overread fences.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest paired follow-on after the engine-contract fence.
Completes the immediate engine / entropy / geometry trio after the engine-contract pass.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the engine-language guardrails tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: CYCLES_REQUIRE_EXPLICIT_WITNESS_AND_SCOPE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves cycle language as derived, scoped, and witness-bound rather than primitive.

candidate_items.name: ENGINE_LANGUAGE_DOES_NOT_LICENSE_DYNAMICS_OR_MACHINE_CLOSURE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent’s main lexical-overread risk into a controller fence against dynamics and machine imports.

candidate_items.name: STABILITY_IS_DESCRIPTIVE_NOT_ADMISSIVE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps stability predicates available without letting them govern admission or equivalence.

candidate_items.name: ENGINE_ADMISSION_REQUIRES_OBSTRUCTION_AND_REMAINS_UNRANKED
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves narrow obstruction-gated engine admission without collapsing into best-engine doctrine.

candidate_items.name: SCALARS_AND_ENGINE_LANGUAGE_DO_NOT_COMPLETE_MEANING
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns scalar and semantic anti-inflation rules into a controller guard against hidden canonicalization.

quarantined_items.name: ENGINE_VOCABULARY_AS_OPTIMIZATION_OR_BEST_CHOICE_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent repeatedly blocks optimization, ranking, and best-choice imports while keeping the lexical temptation visible.

quarantined_items.name: SCALAR_OR_STABILITY_TALK_AS_HIDDEN_CANONICALIZATION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Scalar and stability terms stay discussable residue rather than default governance rules.

notes: This batch was produced after the earlier eleven controller-facing A2-mid reductions as the twelfth bounded controller reduction in this audit pass.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
